q-import { q-components/q-animation.qhtml } q-component script-action-stage { q-property marker: "" section { style { min-height: 100vh; padding: 1.5rem; box-sizing: border-box; display: grid; gap: 1rem; align-content: start; } h1 { text { q-script-action } } div#standaloneBox { style { width: 240px; min-height: 48px; display: grid; place-items: center; background: #1f7a8c; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 800; } text { waiting } } div#sequenceBox { style { width: 240px; min-height: 48px; display: grid; place-items: center; background: #bf7b2c; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 800; } text { sequence pending } } div#parallelBox { style { width: 240px; min-height: 48px; display: grid; place-items: center; background: #6b5dd3; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 800; } text { parallel pending } } } q-script-action { this.closest("script-action-stage").marker = "standalone"; document.querySelector("#standaloneBox").textContent = "standalone ran"; } q-sequential-animation-group seqGroup { q-script-action { document.body.setAttribute("data-seq", "one"); document.querySelector("#sequenceBox").textContent = "sequence one"; } q-script-action { document.body.setAttribute("data-seq", document.body.getAttribute("data-seq") + ",two"); document.querySelector("#sequenceBox").textContent = "sequence one,two"; } } q-parallel-animation-group parallelGroup { q-script-action { document.body.setAttribute("data-parallel-a", "1"); } q-script-action { document.body.setAttribute("data-parallel-b", "1"); document.querySelector("#parallelBox").textContent = "parallel ran"; } } } script-action-stage stage { } q-timer startActionGroups { interval: 100 repeat: false running: true ontimeout { document.querySelector("q-sequential-animation-group").start(); document.querySelector("q-parallel-animation-group").start(); } } q-timer verifyScriptActions { interval: 500 repeat: false running: true ontimeout { var host = document.querySelector("script-action-stage"); var pass = host.marker === "standalone" && document.body.getAttribute("data-seq") === "one,two" && document.body.getAttribute("data-parallel-a") === "1" && document.body.getAttribute("data-parallel-b") === "1"; document.body.setAttribute("data-status", pass ? "pass" : "fail"); } }
